DISCOVERY DEPT 302, AS TO SEP-25-2023 HEARING RE: MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF JEFFREY LOOMISS DEPOSITION IS GRANTED, WITH NO OPPOSITION, PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER PER CRC 391. NO APPEARANCES IS THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE MOTION IS GRANTED TO THE EXTENT THAT IT SEEKS TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO SIT FOR DEPOSITION WITHIN THIRTY DAYS OF THE HEARING ON THE MOTION. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO OPPOSING COUNSEL FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM, AND THEN TO THE PRO TEM JUDGE IN WORD FORMAT, TO JPDEOL@DHILLONLAW.COM . JUDGE PRO TEM: JOHN-PAUL DEOL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-10-2023 Continued To Aug-05-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Jeffrey Loomiss Deposition
Off Calendar Sep-25-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Hearing Re: DEFENDANT JENNIFER LOOMIS Motion To Compel Plaintiff Jeffrey Loomis' Deposition.

No appearances in this matter. No opposition.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling: The motion is granted to the extent that it seeks to compel Plaintiff to sit for deposition within thirty days of the hearing on the motion. All requests for sanctions are denied.

Defendant's counsel to prepare and submit a proposed order to opposing counsel for approval as to form, and then to the pro tem judge in Word format, to JPDeol@dhillonlaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol; Clerk: R. Sahatjian; Not Reported. =(302/JPT)
